message:
feat(resolv): implement __hostalias HOSTALIASES lookup [bd-58e87f]

Replaces the previous always-NULL stub with a real implementation:
reads $HOSTALIASES, parses each line as `alias dnsname`, returns the
first case-insensitive match in a thread-local static buffer
(matching libresolv's static-buffer contract). Skips blank/comment
lines; missing file or unset env returns NULL.

Adds an 8-test conformance harness diff'd against glibc's libresolv
covering basic match, case-insensitive alias, no-match NULL,
blank/comment skipping, first-match-wins, missing file, and unset
env. All cases pass with zero divergences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
